name: BKPF
title: Accounting Document Header
description: One header record per posted FI document. Contains company code, document date, posting date, document type, and reference. Always join to BSEG for line item details.

name: BSEG
title: Accounting Document Segment (Line Items)
description: Line item detail for every FI document. One row per line item. Contains G/L account, amount, cost center, and posting key. Cluster table — use FB03 or FBL3N to read efficiently.

name: BSIS
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for G/L Accounts (Open Items)
description: Secondary index for open G/L account line items. Faster than reading BSEG directly for open item queries. Cleared items move to BSAS.

name: BSAS
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for G/L Accounts (Cleared Items)
description: Secondary index for cleared G/L account line items. Paired with BSIS — open items are in BSIS, cleared items move here after clearing.

name: BSID
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for Customers (Open Items)
description: Secondary index for open customer (AR) line items. Used by FBL5N. Cleared items are stored in BSAD.

name: BSIK
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for Vendors (Open Items)
description: Secondary index for open vendor (AP) line items. Used by FBL1N. Cleared items are stored in BSAK.

name: SKA1
title: G/L Account Master (Chart of Accounts)
description: G/L account master data at chart of accounts level. Contains account group, account type, and short/long text. Company code-specific data is in SKB1.

name: SKB1
title: G/L Account Master (Company Code)
description: G/L account master data specific to a company code. Contains reconciliation account type, field status group, and sort key.

name: T001
title: Company Codes
description: Master table for SAP company codes. Contains company name, country, currency, and chart of accounts assignment.

name: REGUH
title: Payment Program: Settlement Data
description: Header data generated by the F110 automatic payment program. One record per payment document. Contains bank details, payment method, and payment amount.

name: REGUP
title: Payment Program: Processed Items
description: Line items processed by the F110 payment run. Contains the invoices and credit memos cleared by each payment document.

name: CSKS
title: Cost Center Master Data
description: Cost center master data per controlling area. Contains cost center category, responsible person, and validity period.

name: CSKT
title: Cost Center Texts
description: Language-dependent descriptions for cost centers. Join to CSKS to get the cost center name in a specific language.

name: AUFK
title: Order Master Data
description: Master data for CO internal orders, PM orders, and production orders. Contains order type, responsible cost center, and status.

name: COSP
title: CO Object: Cost Totals for External Postings
description: Aggregated cost totals for controlling objects (cost centers, orders) from external FI postings. Used for reporting and plan vs actual comparisons.

name: MARC
title: Plant Data for Material
description: Material master data at plant level. Contains MRP type, procurement type, lot size, and production scheduler. One row per material per plant.

name: MARD
title: Storage Location Data for Material
description: Stock quantities per material, plant, and storage location. Contains unrestricted stock, quality inspection stock, and blocked stock.

name: MKPF
title: Header: Material Document
description: Header record for material documents (goods movements). One row per goods movement posting. Contains posting date and movement type reference.

name: MSEG
title: Document Segment: Material
description: Line items for material documents. Contains material, plant, storage location, quantity, movement type, and account assignment per movement.

name: LFA1
title: Vendor Master (General Section)
description: General vendor master data at client level. Contains vendor name, address, country, and search terms. Company code data is in LFB1.

name: LFB1
title: Vendor Master (Company Code)
description: Vendor master data specific to a company code. Contains payment terms, reconciliation account, and payment method.

name: LFM1
title: Vendor Master (Purchasing)
description: Vendor master data for purchasing org level. Contains order currency, incoterms, and planned delivery time.

name: T001W
title: Plants / Branches
description: Plant master table. Contains plant name, address, and company code assignment. Reference table for all plant-level data.

name: VBUK
title: Sales Document: Header Status
description: Overall processing status for sales document headers. Contains delivery status, billing status, and rejection status.

name: VBUP
title: Sales Document: Item Status
description: Processing status at sales document item level. Contains delivery and billing status per item.

name: KNA1
title: General Data in Customer Master
description: General customer master data at client level. Contains customer name, address, country, and search terms. Company code data is in KNB1.

name: KNB1
title: Customer Master (Company Code)
description: Customer master data specific to a company code. Contains payment terms, reconciliation account, and dunning data.

name: KONV
title: Conditions (Transaction Data)
description: Pricing condition values determined during document processing. Contains the condition amounts for each condition type in orders, deliveries, and invoices.

name: PA0001
title: HR Master Record: Organizational Assignment (IT0001)
description: Infotype 0001 — org assignment for each employee. Contains personnel area, personnel subarea, employee group, employee subgroup, and position.

name: PA0002
title: HR Master Record: Personal Data (IT0002)
description: Infotype 0002 — personal data for each employee. Contains first name, last name, date of birth, gender, and nationality.

name: PA0007
title: HR Master Record: Planned Working Time (IT0007)
description: Infotype 0007 — planned working time and work schedule for each employee. Drives time evaluation and quota generation.

name: PA0008
title: HR Master Record: Basic Pay (IT0008)
description: Infotype 0008 — basic pay for each employee. Contains wage type amounts, pay scale group, and level.

name: PA0014
title: HR Master Record: Recurring Payments/Deductions (IT0014)
description: Infotype 0014 — recurring payroll payments and deductions. Contains wage types for allowances, deductions, and other recurring items.

name: HRP1000
title: Infotype 1000 DB Table for OM Objects
description: Stores org objects for organizational management: org units, positions, jobs, and persons. Central OM table.

name: HRP1001
title: Infotype 1001: Relationships Between OM Objects
description: Stores relationships between org management objects: org unit to position, position to job, org unit to org unit (hierarchy).

name: AFKO
title: Order Header Data: Production Orders
description: Header data for production orders and process orders. Contains material, plant, order type, scheduled dates, and order status.

name: AFPO
title: Order Item: Production Orders
description: Item data for production orders. Contains the material to be produced, order quantity, and production version.

name: MAST
title: Material to BOM Link
description: Links materials to their Bills of Material. Use this to find which BOM applies for a material and plant combination.

name: STPO
title: BOM Item
description: Component items within a Bill of Material. Contains component material, quantity, unit of measure, and item category.

name: PROJ
title: Project Definition
description: Project master data for SAP Project System. Contains project profile, responsible person, and basic dates.

name: PRPS
title: WBS Element Master Data
description: Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) element master data. Contains WBS code, description, responsible cost center, and account assignment.

name: EQUI
title: Equipment Master Data
description: Master data for technical equipment in Plant Maintenance. Contains equipment category, manufacturer, serial number, and functional location assignment.

name: IFLOT
title: Functional Location (Technical Objects)
description: Master data for functional locations in Plant Maintenance. Represents the physical structure and location of technical objects.

name: T000
title: Clients
description: Master table of all SAP clients in the system. Contains client name, city, and logical system name.

name: TSTC
title: SAP Transaction Codes
description: Directory of all SAP transaction codes and their linked program or function module. Useful for finding programs behind transactions.

name: TSTCT
title: Transaction Code Texts
description: Language-dependent descriptions for SAP transaction codes. Join to TSTC to get the transaction description in a specific language.

name: TADIR
title: Directory of Repository Objects
description: Catalogue of all repository objects in the system: programs, function groups, classes, tables, and more. Contains package assignment and original system.

name: TRDIR
title: ABAP Program Directory
description: Contains attributes for all ABAP programs: type (report, module pool, function group), status, and fixed point arithmetic setting.

name: TVARVC
title: Table of Variables in Selection Criteria
description: Stores variable values used in report selection variants. Useful for centralising configurable parameters used in ABAP report variants.

name: NAST
title: Message Status
description: Stores the status of output messages (print, email, EDI) triggered from business documents. Tracks whether output was sent successfully.

name: EDID4
title: IDoc Data Records
description: Stores the segment data for all IDocs. Contains the actual payload of each IDoc segment.

name: EDIDC
title: IDoc Control Records
description: Control record for each IDoc. Contains direction (inbound/outbound), message type, status, sender, and receiver details.

name: USR01
title: User Master Record (Runtime Data)
description: Runtime user master record. Contains user parameters, default printer, and logon language. Maintained automatically.

name: USR02
title: Logon Data
description: User logon data including password hash, account validity dates, and lock status. Used to verify user accounts and lock status.

name: USR04
title: User Master Authorizations
description: Links users to their assigned authorization profiles. Contains the profile names directly assigned to each user.

name: AGR_USERS
title: Assignment of Roles to Users
description: Stores which roles (activity groups) are assigned to which users, including validity dates. Primary table for user-role assignments.

name: AGR_1251
title: Authorization Data for Roles
description: Contains the actual authorization object values assigned to each role. The core table for what a role permits — joined with AGR_USERS to check effective user permissions.

name: VBAK
title: Sales: Sales Document Header
description: Header data for SD sales documents. Contains core document-level information such as sales document number, sales organization, distribution channel, division, sold-to party, shipping conditions, and sales office/group.

name: VBAP
title: Sales: Sales Document Item
description: Item-level data for SD sales documents. Stores material, item category, division, plant, storage location, sales unit, and links to order-related references.

name: VBEP
title: Sales: Sales Document Schedule Line
description: Schedule line data for SD sales document items. Holds schedule line number, category, sales unit, and planned order reference information.

name: VBRK
title: Billing: Billing Document Header
description: Header data for SD billing documents. Contains billing type, billing category, sales organization, distribution channel, division, fiscal year, payer, and sold-to party.

name: VBRP
title: Billing: Billing Document Item
description: Item-level data for SD billing documents. Stores billing item details such as item type, sales unit, division, sales office/group, material, material group, and order reference.

name: VBPA
title: Sales: Document Partner
description: Partner table for SD documents. Stores partner function assignments such as customer, vendor/credit account, address, and country key at document/item level.

name: LIPS
title: Delivery: Delivery Document Item
description: Item-level data for outbound deliveries. Includes delivery item category, plant, storage location, sales unit, sales office/group, division, distribution channel, and sales order reference.

name: LIKP
title: Delivery: Delivery Header
description: Header data for outbound deliveries. Contains delivery number, creator, creation date, sales district, sales organization, delivery type, shipping conditions, sold-to party, and customer group.

name: VBFA
title: Sales: Document Flow
description: Document flow table linking preceding and subsequent SD documents. Useful for tracing relationships between sales orders, deliveries, billing documents, and movement status.

name: MARA
title: Material Master: General Data
description: General material master data. Contains material number, creation and change dates, material type, industry sector, material group, base unit of measure, and division.

name: MAKT
title: Material Master: Material Description
description: Language-dependent material description table. Stores material descriptions and search-related description text by language key.

name: MARM
title: Material Master: Units of Measure
description: Alternative units of measure for materials. Stores the material number, unit of measure, and related physical dimensions such as length, width, and height.

name: MLAN
title: Material Master: Tax Classification
description: Material tax classification data. Stores departure country and tax classification indicators for materials, especially for purchasing scenarios.

name: MBEW
title: Material Master: Material Valuation
description: Valuation data for materials. Contains valuation area, valuation type, standard price, valuation class, valuation category, and price control related information.

name: EBAN
title: Purchasing: Purchase Requisition
description: General data for purchase requisitions. Contains purchase requisition number, item, document type/category, release information, purchasing group, plant, storage location, quantity, and material group.

name: EBKN
title: Purchasing: Purchase Requisition Account Assignment
description: Account assignment data for purchase requisitions. Includes PR number/item, quantity, related sales document references, schedule line, and order number.

name: EKKN
title: Purchasing: Purchase Order Account Assignment
description: Account assignment data for purchase order items. Stores purchasing document/item, quantity, linked sales document references, schedule line, and order number.

name: EKKO
title: Purchasing: Purchase Order Header
description: Header data for purchasing documents. Includes purchasing document number, purchasing organization, company code, document category/type, item interval, status, currency, document date, and quotation reference.

name: EKPO
title: Purchasing: Purchase Order Item
description: Item-level data for purchase orders. Stores material, order quantity, plant, storage location, company code, stock type, RFQ number, and item status.

name: EKET
title: Purchasing: Purchase Order Schedule Line
description: Schedule line data for purchase order items. Contains item schedule line number, delivery date, goods receipt quantity, scheduled quantity, issued quantity, and goods issue date.

name: KNVK
title: Customer Master: Contact Partner
description: Customer contact person data. Links customer numbers to contact person records and names.

name: KNVV
title: Customer Master: Sales Data
description: Sales-area specific customer data. Stores sales organization, distribution channel, division, customer group, sales group, and sales office.

name: KNVA
title: Customer Master: Loading Points
description: Customer loading point data. Stores customer assignment to unloading point and default unloading point details.

name: KNVI
title: Customer Master: Tax Indicator
description: Customer tax-related data. Stores customer number, department, country, and tax category information.

name: KNVS
title: Customer Master: Shipping Data
description: Customer shipping point data. Stores customer assignments to shipping and receiving points.

name: KNVP
title: Customer Master: Partner Functions
description: Customer partner function assignments in the sales area. Stores sales organization, distribution channel, partner function, partner number, and counter.

name: KNVD
title: Customer Master: Output / Sales Requirement Form
description: Customer sales-area related form/output data. Contains customer, sales organization, distribution channel, division, and output type information.

name: KNVL
title: Customer Master: License Data
description: Customer license data by country and tax category. Stores customer, department, country, tax category, and license number.

name: DD01L
title: ABAP Dictionary: Domains
description: Stores ABAP Dictionary domain definitions. Used to define technical attributes and allowed value concepts that can be reused by data elements.

name: DD02L
title: ABAP Dictionary: Table Definitions
description: Core metadata for ABAP Dictionary tables and views. Common source when searching SAP standard table names in a system.

name: DD02T
title: ABAP Dictionary: Table Texts
description: Language-dependent short descriptions for ABAP Dictionary tables and views.

name: DD02V
title: ABAP Dictionary: Table/View Metadata View
description: Dictionary metadata view related to table and view definitions, often used together with DD02L and DD02T for lookup scenarios.

name: DD03L
title: ABAP Dictionary: Table Fields
description: Stores field-level metadata for ABAP Dictionary tables and structures, including field names, positions, key flag, and data element references.

name: DD03T
title: ABAP Dictionary: Field Texts
description: Language-dependent texts for fields in ABAP Dictionary objects.

name: DD04L
title: ABAP Dictionary: Data Elements
description: Stores ABAP Dictionary data element definitions used by table fields, structures, and parameters.

name: DD07L
title: ABAP Dictionary: Domain Fixed Values
description: Contains allowed values and fixed value definitions for domains in the ABAP Dictionary.

name: DD09L
title: ABAP Dictionary: Technical Settings
description: Stores technical settings for Dictionary tables such as data class, size category, buffering, and logging behavior.

name: DD12L
title: ABAP Dictionary: Secondary Indices
description: Contains metadata for secondary indexes defined on Dictionary tables.

name: TDEVC
title: Repository: Packages
description: Stores development packages, also known as development classes, used to organize repository objects.

name: TFDIR
title: Repository: Function Modules
description: Directory of function modules and their technical assignment information.

name: TFTIT
title: Repository: Function Module Texts
description: Language-dependent short texts for function modules.

name: ENLFDIR
title: Repository: Additional Function Module Attributes
description: Stores additional technical attributes for function modules.

name: TMDIR
title: ABAP Objects: Methods in Classes
description: Directory information for methods belonging to ABAP classes.

name: D010TAB
title: Repository: Program to Table Usage
description: Contains relationships between ABAP reports/programs and the tables they use.

name: TAPLT
title: Repository: Program Application Long Texts
description: Stores long texts related to ABAP programs and applications.

name: SEOCLASS
title: ABAP Objects: Classes
description: Stores ABAP class definitions in the Class Builder / ABAP Objects repository.

name: D020S
title: Dynpro: Screen Definitions
description: Stores screen definitions and technical data for classic dynpros.

name: D020T
title: Dynpro: Screen Texts
description: Language-dependent short descriptions for classic dynpro screens.

name: TSE05
title: ABAP Editor: Insert Commands
description: Customizing and definition data used by ABAP Editor insert command functionality.

name: DM42S
title: ABAP Dictionary: Table Relationships
description: Stores relationship information between tables, used by Dictionary relationship display functions such as SD11.

name: T100
title: Messages: Message Texts
description: Stores SAP message class texts used across applications and custom developments.

name: TSTCP
title: Transactions: Transaction Parameters
description: Stores parameter transactions and related settings for transaction code execution.

name: FILEPATH
title: File Interface: Logical File Paths
description: Defines logical file paths used by SAP file interface configuration.

name: PATH
title: File Interface: Physical Paths
description: Stores physical operating system path definitions used by logical file handling.

name: SYST
title: ABAP Runtime: System Fields Structure
description: Structure containing ABAP system fields such as SY-MANDT, SY-UNAME, and SY-DATUM. Useful as a reference object, though not a normal application table.

name: VBMOD
title: Update Task: Registered Update Function Modules
description: Stores registered update function module entries for the SAP update task.

name: VBDATA
title: Update Task: Update Data
description: Stores serialized update task data processed by the SAP update system.

name: STXFADM
title: Smart Forms: Administration
description: Administration data for Smart Forms objects and generated function modules.

name: STXB
title: Texts: Non-SAPscript Texts
description: Stores texts in a non-SAPscript format and is used in text handling scenarios.

name: STXH
title: Texts: SAPscript Text Header
description: Header table for SAPscript and standard text objects.

name: STXL
title: Texts: SAPscript Text Lines
description: Cluster-like storage for SAPscript and standard text line content.

name: TSP01
title: Spool: Spool Requests
description: Stores spool request header data for SAP print and output processing.

name: TSP02
title: Spool: Output Requests
description: Stores print output request information connected to spool processing.

name: TST01
title: TemSe: Header
description: Header table for TemSe objects used in spool and temporary sequential storage.

name: TST03
title: TemSe: Data
description: Data storage table for TemSe objects used by spool and temporary sequential storage.

name: TTXOB
title: Texts: Valid Text Objects
description: Stores valid text object definitions used in SAP text management.

name: TTXOT
title: Texts: Text Object Descriptions
description: Language-dependent descriptions for valid text objects.

name: DOKIL
title: Documentation: Index
description: Index table for SAP documentation objects, used to locate documentation entries.

name: DOKHL
title: Documentation: Header
description: Header data for SAP documentation objects.

name: DOKTL
title: Documentation: Text Lines
description: Text line contents for SAP documentation objects.

name: NRIV
title: Number Ranges: Intervals
description: Stores current number range intervals and current number status for number range objects.

name: TNRO
title: Number Ranges: Objects
description: Defines number range objects used by SAP applications and custom developments.

name: LTDX
title: ALV: Display Layouts
description: Stores ALV layout variants and display layout definitions.

name: LTDXD
title: ALV: Default Display Variants
description: Stores default ALV display variant settings.

name: TCVIEW
title: Table Controls: User Views
description: Stores user-specific settings for table control views in classic dynpro applications.

name: USR05
title: User Administration: Parameter IDs
description: Stores user parameter IDs and their assigned values.

name: USR10
title: User Administration: Authorization Profiles
description: Stores authorization profile definitions and profile assignment related data.

name: UST12
title: Authorization: Authorizations
description: Stores generated authorization data assigned through profiles and roles.

name: USR12
title: Authorization: Authorization Values
description: Stores authorization field values for generated authorizations.

name: USR21
title: User Administration: User to Address Assignment
description: Links SAP user IDs to Business Address Services person/address keys.

name: USR41
title: User Administration: Active Logon Data
description: Stores data related to active user sessions and logons, commonly relevant for session monitoring scenarios.

name: UST04
title: Authorization: User to Profile Assignment
description: Stores assignments of authorization profiles to users.

name: DEVACCESS
title: Workbench: Developer Access Key Data
description: Stores developer registration and access key related information in classic SAP development scenarios.

name: USR40
title: Security: Prohibited Passwords
description: Stores forbidden passwords or password patterns used by SAP password checks.

name: USOBT
title: Authorization Proposal: Transaction to Authorization Object
description: Stores transaction-based authorization proposal data used in role maintenance.

name: TSTCA
title: Authorization: Transaction to Authorization Check
description: Stores transaction code to authorization object check relationships.

name: TOBJ
title: Authorization: Objects
description: Stores authorization object definitions and class assignments.

name: ADCP
title: Business Address Services: Person to Address Assignment
description: Links persons to addresses and communication-related assignment data in BAS.

name: ADRP
title: Business Address Services: Persons
description: Stores person master data used by SAP Business Address Services.

name: ADR2
title: Business Address Services: Telephone Numbers
description: Stores telephone numbers for Business Address Services address entries.

name: ADRC
title: Business Address Services: Addresses
description: Central address table in Business Address Services used across many SAP applications.

name: ADRCITY
title: Business Address Services: Postal Cities
description: Stores postal city information used in address handling.

name: BTCUEV
title: Background Processing: User Events
description: Stores event IDs used for background processing and job control.

name: BTCSEV
title: Background Processing: System Events
description: Stores system event IDs used in background processing.

name: BTCJSTAT
title: Background Processing: Job Runtime Statistics
description: Stores runtime statistics and status-related information for background processing jobs.

name: CCCFLOW
title: Client Administration: Client Copy Flow
description: Stores control flow information for client copy activities.

name: SDBAC
title: Database Administration: Database Actions
description: Stores database action related administration information.

name: VRSX
title: Version Management: Central Table
description: Central storage used by SAP version management for repository object versions.

name: CVERS
title: System Administration: Software Component Versions
description: Stores installed software component versions and release status in the SAP system.

name: PAT03
title: System Administration: Support / Hot Packages
description: Stores package and support package related information in the system.

name: TPROT
title: Table Logging: Logged Tables
description: Stores configuration for tables that are subject to table logging.

name: DBTABLOG
title: Table Logging: Change Log Records
description: Stores log records of changes made to logged tables.

name: E070
title: Transport Management: Requests and Tasks Header
description: Header table for transport requests and tasks.

name: E071
title: Transport Management: Request Objects
description: Stores repository and customizing objects contained in transport requests and tasks.

name: E071K
title: Transport Management: Table Key Entries
description: Stores transport key entries for transported table data.

name: E070C
title: Transport Management: Source and Target Client
description: Stores source and target client information for transport requests and tasks.

name: TLOCK
title: Transport Management: Lock Table
description: Stores transport-related lock information for repository and customizing objects.

name: VARID
title: Variants: Report Variants
description: Stores report selection variants and their technical assignments.

name: VARIT
title: Variants: Variant Texts
description: Language-dependent descriptions for report variants.

name: TVARV
title: Variants: Selection Variables
description: Stores variables used in report selection criteria and dynamic variant values.

name: VARI
title: Variants: Variant Storage
description: Stores variant content in a generic storage format similar to INDX-based persistence.

name: VARIS
title: Variants: Variant to Selection Screen Assignment
description: Stores assignment information between variants and selection screen definitions.

name: SOFM
title: SAP Office: Folder Contents
description: Stores folder-related content information in SAP Office.

name: SOOS
title: SAP Office: Send Process
description: Stores send process and send request information in SAP Office.

name: SWWWIHEAD
title: Workflow: Work Item Header
description: Header table for SAP Business Workflow work items.

name: PTREQ_STATUS_TRA
title: Workflow / HCM: Status Transfers
description: Stores status transfer information used in leave request and approval related processes.

name: CDHDR
title: Change Documents: Header
description: Header table for SAP change documents. Commonly used to analyze who changed what and when.

name: CDPOS
title: Change Documents: Items
description: Item-level details for SAP change documents, including changed fields and old/new values.

name: JCDS
title: Status Management: Change Documents
description: Stores change document history for system and user statuses.

name: JEST
title: Status Management: Individual Object Status
description: Stores active and inactive system/user statuses for objects.

name: JSTO
title: Status Management: Status Object Information
description: Stores header-level status object information used in SAP status management.

name: ARCH_OBJ
title: Archiving: Archiving Objects
description: Stores definitions of archiving objects used in archiving and reorganization.

name: SNAP
title: Runtime Errors: Short Dumps
description: Stores snapshots for ABAP runtime errors and dumps.

name: TBTCO
title: Background Processing: Job Overview
description: Header/status overview table for SAP background jobs.

name: TBTCP
title: Background Processing: Job Steps
description: Stores individual job steps for SAP background jobs.

name: DDSHPVAL5
title: ABAP Dictionary: Personal Help Values
description: Stores personal help values used in input help and user-specific search help scenarios.

name: TCURC
title: Currency: Currency Codes
description: Stores currency keys and core currency definitions.

name: TCURT
title: Currency: Currency Texts
description: Language-dependent descriptions for currency codes.

name: TCURR
title: Currency: Exchange Rates
description: Stores exchange rates between currencies for defined rate types and dates.

name: TCURX
title: Currency: Decimal Places
description: Stores currency-specific decimal place settings.

name: TCURF
title: Currency: Conversion Factors
description: Stores conversion factors used in currency conversion logic.

name: TCURV
title: Currency: Exchange Rate Types
description: Stores currency exchange rate type definitions and settings.

name: T247
title: Calendar: Month Names
description: Stores month names and short texts by language.

name: T015M
title: Calendar: Names of Months
description: Stores names of months used in calendar-related texts.

name: TFACD
title: Calendar: Factory Calendar Definition
description: Stores factory calendar definitions used in scheduling and date calculations.

name: TTZZ
title: Time Zones: Time Zone Definitions
description: Stores SAP time zone definitions.

name: TTZD
title: Time Zones: Daylight Saving Rules
description: Stores daylight saving time and summer time rule definitions.

name: THOCI
title: Calendar: Public Holiday Calendar Index
description: Stores index information for public holiday calendars.

name: T012
title: House Bank: Banks
description: Stores house bank definitions by company code.

name: T012A
title: House Bank: Payment Method Assignment
description: Stores assignment of payment methods to house banks and transfer-related configuration.

name: T012B
title: House Bank: Payment Method Details
description: Stores additional payment method assignment details for house bank processing.

name: T012C
title: House Bank: Bank Transaction Terms
description: Stores terms and settings for bank transactions in house bank processing.

name: T012D
title: House Bank: DME and Foreign Payment Parameters
description: Stores parameters for DME processing and foreign payment methods.

name: T012E
title: House Bank: EDI-Compatible House Banks
description: Stores EDI-related compatibility data for house banks and payment methods.

name: T012K
title: House Bank: Bank Accounts
description: Stores house bank account definitions for company codes and house banks.

name: T012O
title: House Bank: Additional Bank Account Details
description: Stores additional detailed data for bank accounts in house bank scenarios.

name: BNKA
title: Bank Master: Bank Keys
description: Central bank master table storing bank key and bank address data.

name: TIBAN
title: Bank Master: IBAN
description: Stores IBAN information connected to bank master and account data.

name: T005
title: Customizing: Countries
description: Country definitions used across SAP customizing and master data.

name: T006
title: Customizing: Units of Measure
description: Defines units of measure used across logistics and master data.

name: TTZDF
title: Calendar: Summer Time Rules (Fixed Annual Dates)
description: Stores fixed-date daylight saving time rules for time zone configuration.

name: TTZDV
